title: amaryllis × dioica
intro: Amaryllis × dioica, also known as the Belladonna or Deadly Nightshade, is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family. The plant contains tropane alkaloids, which have medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, although its toxicity can be hazardous if ingested in large quantities. Consuming the plant's extracts may provide health benefits such as relief from chronic pain and muscle spasms, but caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including tinctures, infusions, and ointments, but it is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using it for medicinal purposes.
